item.name: Accompaniment Node
item.description:
Marvel at the advanced accompaniment technology of the Allagan Empire.

Use item to acquire the accompaniment node minion.
item.tooltip:
To proceed, please agree
to the terms and conditions
of use.
   - Guidance Node
item.specialactiondescription:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 60 to all enemies within range while reducing movement speed by 70%.
Duration: 10s
